home.heroSubtitle:
Sausages, live music and harbor views.
Nedre Strandgate 23, by the waterfront in Stavanger.

gnuSoundsCard.title: Gnu Sounds
gnuSoundsCard.description: Full concerts filmed from our stage. The sound of Gnu, straight to your living room.

gnuRauaCard.title: Gnu-Rauå
gnuRauaCard.description: Stavanger's most unnecessary monument — and the story behind it.

bookingCard.title: Booking
bookingCard.description: Office party, birthday, concert or something else entirely? Gnu is ready.

gnuSounds.description: Full-length recordings from our stage. Concerts, jam sessions and nights you were either at — or wish you had been.

gnuRaua.subtitle: Stavanger's most unnecessary monument — and why it matters
gnuRaua.content1: Gnu-Rauå is exactly what you think it is: the backside of a gnu, framed in gold, mounted on the wall. Foam, fur and pride. It's absurd, unnecessary, and absolutely perfect.
gnuRaua.content2: After 27 years apart from the head, the rear end has finally found its place on the wall. And with that, Gnu became a little more whole. Not a complete gnu, but more than the sum of its parts.
gnuRaua.content3: Welcome to the monument no one saw coming, but everyone needs. Cheers to the rump.

gnuRaua.imageAlt7: Gnu-Rauå — the backside framed in gold

om.mainDescription: Gnu is an independent bar by the waterfront. Famous sausages, legendary quiz nights, and live music that gets people dancing even when they only came for a beer.
om.secondaryDescription: Pull up a chair, look out over Vågen, and join the herd.

musicBar.title: Music Bar
musicBar.description: Live concerts, jazz jams, DJ nights and vinyl listening sessions. Music is the lifeblood of Gnu.

quiz.title: Quiz & Entertainment
quiz.description: The Thursday quiz is legendary. Bingo, music trivia and good times year-round.

food.title: Food & Drink
food.description: Famous sausages, a solid beer and spirits selection, and everything you need to keep going.

view.title: Views & Atmosphere
view.description: Harbor views right from the bar. Brutalist charm and a herd mentality that warms the heart.

booking.bookingInfoText1: Gnu works for just about anything — office party, concert, private event or something you haven't quite found a word for yet. We've done it all, from small gatherings to full-blown festival nights.
booking.bookingInfoText2: Drop us a message with what you're thinking, and we'll figure it out together.
booking.formPlaceholder: Tell us what you have in mind...
